content.problemStatement:
For an array AAA of length NNN, we define f(A)f(A)f(A) to be the sum of GCDs of its adjacent elements, i.e.

f(A)=‚ąĎi=1N‚ąí1gcd‚Ā°(Ai,Ai+1)f(A) = \sum_{i=1}^{N-1} \gcd(A_i, A_{i+1})f(A)=i=1‚ąĎN‚ąí1‚Äčgcd(Ai‚Äč,Ai+1‚Äč)You are given two integers NNN and KKK.

Find any array AAA of length NNN, consisting of **distinct integers** between 111 and 10910^9109, such that f(A)=Kf(A) = Kf(A)=K.

If multiple valid arrays exist, you may find any of them.

If no valid arrays exist, print ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1 instead.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and KKK ‚Äď the length of the array and the required value of f(A)f(A)f(A), respectively.


Output Format
For each test case, on a new line:



If no valid array exists, print the single integer ‚ąí1-1‚ąí1.
Otherwise, output NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč, representing the array you found.

Each AiA_iAi‚Äč should be an integer between 111 and 10910^9109, and f(A)=Kf(A) = Kf(A)=K must hold. The elements of AAA must be pairwise distinct, i.e. Ai‚Č†AjA_i \neq A_jAi‚ÄčÓÄ†=Aj‚Äč for i‚Č†ji \neq jiÓÄ†=j.

If there are multiple valid arrays, you may find any of them.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 2‚čÖ1052\cdot 10^52‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: We have A=[15,54,8]A = [15, 54, 8]A=[15,54,8], for which f(A)=gcd‚Ā°(15,54)+gcd‚Ā°(54,8)=3+2=5f(A) = \gcd(15, 54) + \gcd(54, 8) = 3 + 2 = 5f(A)=gcd(15,54)+gcd(54,8)=3+2=5, as required.
Test case 222: It can be proved that there does not exist any array of length 555, with distinct integers between 111 and 10910^9109, such that the sum of adjacent GCDs equals 333.
Test case 333: We have f(A)=gcd‚Ā°(9,210)+gcd‚Ā°(210,72)+gcd‚Ā°(72,30)+gcd‚Ā°(30,57)=3+6+6+3=18f(A) = \gcd(9, 210) + \gcd(210, 72) + \gcd(72, 30) + \gcd(30, 57) = 3 + 6 + 6 + 3 = 18f(A)=gcd(9,210)+gcd(210,72)+gcd(72,30)+gcd(30,57)=3+6+6+3=18.
